title: Set NEXT_PUBLIC_POSTHOG_KEY in Vercel environment variables
description: Manual step: copy PostHog project key from PostHog → Project Settings and add to Vercel Dashboard → Project Settings → Environment Variables. Same key as LifQ mobile app.

title: Create TrackedCTA component
description: src/components/ui/tracked-cta.tsx — client wrapper around ButtonLink that fires analytics.ctaClicked(location) on click. Used in Hero, FinalCTA, and pricing page.

title: Create HomePageTracker client component
description: src/components/home/HomePageTracker.tsx — null-rendering 'use client' component that fires analytics.landingPageViewed() in useEffect. Workaround for Server Component homepage.

title: Create analytics.ts event helpers
description: src/lib/analytics.ts — typed helpers: landingPageViewed, ctaClicked(location), pricingViewed, signupStarted, signupCompleted. All guard against typeof window === 'undefined'.

title: Create PostHogProvider component (no replays, no autocapture)
description: src/components/providers/PostHogProvider.tsx — client component that initializes posthog-js with disable_session_recording, autocapture: false, capture_pageview: false. Wraps app in PHProvider.

title: PostHog Analytics Integration
description: Wire up PostHog with 5 custom events (landing_page_viewed, cta_clicked, pricing_viewed, signup_started, signup_completed). No session replays, no autocapture. Shared PostHog project with the LifQ mobile app for a unified funnel view.

title: Reconnect Vercel from GitLab to GitHub mirror repo; remove VERCEL_TOKEN/ORG_ID/PROJECT_ID from GitLab CI/CD variables
description: After mirror is verified, reconnect Vercel to GitHub repo in Project Settings → Git. Set production branch to master. Delete the three Vercel secrets from GitLab CI/CD variables.

title: Configure GitLab → GitHub push mirror (Settings → Repository → Mirroring) and verify all branches appear on GitHub
description: Create empty GitHub repo, generate PAT with repo scope, add push mirror in GitLab. Mirror all branches so Vercel sees feature branches for preview deployments.

title: Verify pre-commit hook: stage file with lint error → commit blocked; --no-verify bypasses
description: Manual smoke test of the hook. Confirms escape hatch works for WIP commits.

title: Add lint-staged config to package.json: ESLint --fix + tsc --noEmit on *.{ts,tsx}
description: Runs only on staged files. tsc must check whole project (TypeScript limitation). ESLint auto-fixes trivial issues.

title: Install husky + lint-staged; run npx husky init
description: husky init creates .husky/ and adds prepare script to package.json.

title: Configure .husky/pre-commit to run npx lint-staged
description: Replace default npm test hook with lint-staged.

title: Add e2e job to .gitlab-ci.yml using mcr.microsoft.com/playwright:v1.60.0-jammy; remove deploy jobs
description: e2e job uses build artifact (.next/), starts prod server, runs Playwright. Vercel deploy jobs removed — deployment now via GitHub mirror.

title: Add test:e2e, test:e2e:ui, test:e2e:report scripts to package.json; fix start script to --port 3001
description: start script must specify port 3001 so CI npm run start listens on the same port Playwright targets.

title: Add Playwright output dirs to .gitignore (/playwright-report/, /test-results/, /e2e/.auth/)
description: Prevent generated test artifacts from being committed.

title: Create e2e/pricing.spec.ts — 3 plan cards, billing toggle, Most popular badge
description: Validates pricing page renders all plans and the Annual/Monthly toggle is interactive.

title: Create e2e/beta-signup.spec.ts — form fields, honeypot hidden, validation, submit button
description: Validates form is accessible, honeypot invisible, client-side validation fires on empty submit.

title: Create e2e/home.spec.ts — homepage renders, hero copy, AppShowcase, FinalCTA, CTA link
description: Validates the homepage does not regress on core sections visible to first-time visitors.

title: Create e2e/nav.spec.ts — Pricing link, Log in link, Join the beta, logo nav
description: Validates all nav links have correct hrefs and the logo returns to homepage.

title: Install @playwright/test and run npx playwright install chromium
description: Add @playwright/test to devDependencies, install Chromium browser binary locally for dev runs.

title: Create playwright.config.ts with baseURL env var, chromium-only, CI retries, webServer for local dev
description: Config reads PLAYWRIGHT_BASE_URL env var; when unset and not in CI, auto-starts dev server via webServer block.

title: E2E Testing & Dev Quality Gates
description: Install Playwright for automated browser testing of all key pages. Add Husky + lint-staged pre-commit hooks so lint and type errors are caught before they reach CI. Restructure GitLab CI to remove Vercel deploy jobs (deploy moves to GitHub mirror → Vercel auto-deploy).

title: Verify lifq.ai resolves, SSL certificate provisioned, and all routes work
Cancel Wix subscription after confirming lifq.ai is fully operational on Vercel
Add lifq.ai custom domain in Vercel project settings
Update DNS records at registrar to point lifq.ai at Vercel (A/CNAME records)
Set all production environment variables in Vercel dashboard — use SAME Supabase keys as lifq app (dfnemjldftwzwjturglh.supabase.co), same Resend API key, same PostHog project, same Stripe keys
Run end-to-end smoke test: all pages load, pricing page shows correct plans, beta signup writes to Supabase and sends Resend email
close_reason: Page-render smoke tests automated by Playwright (lifq-web-6u2). Manual verification of Supabase insert + Resend email remains a one-time post-deploy checklist step during cutover.

title: Install and configure Stripe SDK: npm install stripe @stripe/stripe-js
Connect Vercel to GitHub mirror repo and verify first preview deployment builds successfully
Deployment & Cutover
description: Deploy to Vercel, set production environment variables (shared with lifq app), configure lifq.ai domain, DNS cutover from Wix.

title: Add 'Pricing' link to Nav component
Add pricing link and 'Upgrade' CTA to Footer
Create src/app/api/checkout/route.ts: POST handler — receives priceId, creates Stripe Checkout session (unauthenticated; user tied to session post-payment via Stripe metadata)
Wire pricing CTAs: during beta phase CTA → /beta-signup; post-beta CTA → Stripe Checkout session
Add annual/monthly billing toggle with price switching and savings callout (e.g. 'Save 20% annually')
Add Stripe price ID env vars to .env.example: STRIPE_SOLO_ANNUAL_PRICE_ID, STRIPE_SOLO_MONTHLY_PRICE_ID, STRIPE_FAMILY_ANNUAL_PRICE_ID, STRIPE_FAMILY_MONTHLY_PRICE_ID (reuse from lifq)
Pricing & Upgrade Page
description: Build /pricing page showing Free/Solo/Family tiers with annual/monthly toggle. Reuse existing Stripe price IDs from lifq backend. CTAs link to beta signup during beta phase; Stripe Checkout for post-beta web purchases.

title: Create src/app/pricing/page.tsx: pricing tier cards (Free, Solo, Family) with feature comparison
Integrate PostHog: initialize with NEXT_PUBLIC_POSTHOG_KEY (same project as mobile app), wrap app in PostHog provider
Integrate Vercel Analytics: add <Analytics /> to root layout
Create src/app/robots.ts: allow all, sitemap reference
Add per-page metadata to beta-signup, privacy, and terms pages
Create src/app/sitemap.ts: dynamic sitemap for all public routes
Add OG metadata to src/app/layout.tsx: title template, description, og:image, Twitter card (pointing at lifq.ai)
SEO & Analytics
description: Add OG metadata, sitemap, robots.txt, Vercel Analytics, and PostHog — sharing PostHog key with lifq mobile app where applicable.

title: Create src/app/terms/page.tsx with placeholder Terms of Service content
Create src/app/privacy/page.tsx with placeholder Privacy Policy content
Legal Pages
description: Create placeholder Privacy Policy and Terms of Service pages, ready for real legal copy.

title: Configure Resend: create email template for beta signup confirmation (use same RESEND_API_KEY as lifq app)
Create src/app/beta-signup/page.tsx: React Hook Form + shadcn inputs, all 8 fields + honeypot, inline validation, loading state, submit label 'Request my invite'
Create src/app/beta-signup/thank-you/page.tsx: confirmation messaging after successful signup
Create src/lib/constants/beta-signup-labels.ts: display label maps for select/checkbox fields
Create src/app/api/beta-signup/route.ts: POST handler — validate → honeypot check → duplicate email check → Supabase insert → Resend email → JSON response
Create src/lib/validations/beta-signup.ts: Zod schema for all 8 fields + honeypot
Create Supabase migration: supabase/migrations/0001_beta_signups.sql in existing Supabase project (dfnemjldftwzwjturglh)
Create src/lib/supabase/client.ts (browser client), server.ts (cookies client), admin.ts (service role)
Beta Signup Flow
description: Build complete beta signup: Supabase table (same project as lifq app), Zod validation, API route with honeypot and duplicate-email handling, form UI, thank-you page, and Resend confirmation email.

title: Assemble all home sections in src/app/page.tsx in correct order
Create src/components/home/FinalCTA.tsx: 'Ready for clarity?' section with beta application CTA
Create src/components/home/PrivacyCommitments.tsx: 4 privacy bullet points
Create src/components/home/Vision.tsx: Personal Protection Operating System vision statement section
Create src/components/home/SolutionGrid.tsx: 3-card grid (Clarity, Intelligence, Family Confidence)
Create src/components/home/RealWorldQuestions.tsx: 4 quote cards (rental car, overlapping policies, credit card travel, unused benefits)
Create src/components/home/HowItWorks.tsx: 3-step numbered sequence (Upload, Analyze, Protect)
Create src/components/home/PositioningTagline.tsx: 'first AI-powered Household Protection Intelligence platform' eyebrow
Create src/components/home/ProblemGrid.tsx: 4-card grid (Fragmented, Confusing, Expensive, Uncertain)
Homepage
description: Build all 9 homepage section components and assemble in page.tsx. Content source: docs/wix-content-extraction.md.

title: Create src/components/home/Hero.tsx: H1, subhead, 'Join the beta waitlist' CTA, free/limited beta note
Wire Nav + Footer into src/app/layout.tsx with base metadata and font variables
Create src/components/layout/Nav.tsx: LifQ wordmark left, 'Join beta' button right, mobile hamburger using shadcn Sheet
Create src/components/layout/Footer.tsx: logo, Privacy/Terms/Contact/lifq.ai links, social icons, copyright
Layout & Navigation
description: Build shared layout components: Container, Nav (with mobile hamburger), Footer, and wire into root layout.

title: Create src/components/layout/Container.tsx (max-w-6xl, responsive padding)
Replace generated tailwind.config.ts with brand token config (Trust Blue, Community Teal, Friendly Orange, Deep Navy, Off-white)
Update globals.css: CSS custom properties for shadcn semantic tokens mapped to LiFQ palette, dark mode tokens
Configure Google Fonts in layout.tsx: Poppins (400/500/600) + Source Sans 3 (400/500/600) as CSS variables
Brand Foundation
description: Apply LiFQ brand tokens to Tailwind config, set up CSS custom properties, configure Google Fonts, and install shadcn/ui.

title: Install shadcn/ui (New York style, Slate base, CSS variables)
Create Vercel project and link to GitLab repo
Add .env.local with Supabase URL, anon key, and service role key
Copy planning artifacts (CLAUDE.md, tailwind.config.ts, .env.example, docs/) into project
Initialize beads (bd init) in project root and add CLAUDE.md integration block
Connect GitLab repo remote and push initial commit
Project Setup & Infrastructure
description: Bootstrap the Next.js 15 project, connect GitLab and Vercel, configure environment variables, and initialize beads issue tracker.

title: Bootstrap Next.js 15 project with App Router, TypeScript, Tailwind, src-dir
